name: email-mcp
description: Multi-service email platform supporting SMTP/IMAP, SendGrid, Mailgun, Resend, local testing, and webhook integrations

smtp_password.title: SMTP Password/App Password
smtp_password.description: Password or App Password for SMTP authentication

imap_password.title: IMAP Password/App Password
imap_password.description: Password or App Password for IMAP authentication

sendgrid_api_key.title: SendGrid API Key
sendgrid_api_key.description: SendGrid API key for transactional email

mailgun_api_key.title: Mailgun API Key
mailgun_api_key.description: Mailgun API key for transactional email

resend_api_key.title: Resend API Key
resend_api_key.description: Resend API key for transactional email

slack_webhook_url.title: Slack Webhook URL
slack_webhook_url.description: Slack webhook URL for sending emails to Slack

discord_webhook_url.title: Discord Webhook URL
discord_webhook_url.description: Discord webhook URL for sending emails to Discord

default_service.title: Default Email Service
default_service.description: Default service to use for sending emails

tools.name: send_email
tools.description: Send emails via multiple service types (SMTP, API, webhook)

tools.name: check_inbox
tools.description: Check inbox via IMAP or service-specific APIs

tools.name: email_status
tools.description: Get server configuration and connectivity status

tools.name: configure_service
tools.description: Configure different email services dynamically at runtime

tools.name: list_services
tools.description: List available and configured email services

tools.name: email_help
tools.description: Get help and documentation for email operations
